name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state, turn

TypeOK == /\ state ∈ [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn ∈ 1..N

(* -- initial state -- *)
Init == /\ state = [i ∈ 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn = 1

(* -- process i's next-state relation -- *)

    /\ state[i] = "idle" 
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
    /\ turn' = turn
    \/ state[i] = "trying" 
    /\ turn = i 
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
    /\ turn' = turn
    \/ state[i] = "trying" 
    /\ turn # i 
    /\ state' = state
    /\ turn' = turn
    \/ state[i] = "critical" 
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
    /\ turn' = turn

(* -- next-state relation for all processes -- *)
Next == ∨ ∃ i ∈ 1..N: Process(i)

(* -- specification -- *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

(* -- mutual exclusion invariant -- *)
MutualExclusion == 
    \A i, j ∈ 1..N: i # j => state[i] # "critical" \/ state[j] # "critical"

(* -- TLC configuration -- *)
CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N > 0
INVARIANT TypeOK
INVARIANT MutualExclusion

        { VoteNoMsg(p) : p \in participants } \cup

    /\ coordinator \in participants

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES num, flag

(* Pure TLA+ specification of the Bakery algorithm *)

(* Constants *)
CONSTANT N

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ num \in [1..N -> 0]
        /\ flag \in [1..N -> FALSE]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ flag[i] = FALSE
        /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
        /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
        /\ flag' = [flag' EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>> \ {i}

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

(* q is a sequence of length K, representing the queue slots *)
(* head and tail are indices into q, modulo K *)
(* size is the current number of elements in the queue *)

(* Helper functions *)
IsFull == size = K
IsEmpty == size = 0

  \* Producer blocks when the queue is full
  \* When not full, it writes to the tail position
  \* and updates tail and size

  \* The actual write is represented by updating the sequence q
  \* Since TLA+ sequences are immutable, we use the SUBST operator

  \* The tail index is updated modulo K
  \* The size is incremented

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, InitState

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ channel \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]]
          /\ recorded \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ channelState \in [1..N -> [1..N -> Seq(Nat)]]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = InitState
        /\ channel = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]
        /\ recorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ channelState = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> <<>>]]

(* Sending a marker message *)
SendMarker(i, j) == /\ recorded[i] = TRUE
                    /\ channel[i][j] = <<>> \* No marker in channel
                    /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = <<>>]
                    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i][j] = <<>>]
                    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded>>

(* Sending a normal message *)
SendMessage(i, j, m) == /\ recorded[i] = FALSE
                        /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![i][j] = Append(channel[i][j], m)]
                        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, channelState>>

(* Receiving a marker message *)
ReceiveMarker(i, j) == /\ recorded[i] = FALSE
                       /\ channel[i][j] = <<>> \* Marker is the only message
                       /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                       /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i][j] = <<>>]
                       /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel>>

(* Receiving a normal message *)
ReceiveMessage(i, j, m) == /\ recorded[i] = TRUE
                           /\ channel[i][j] = <<m>> \* Only one message
                           /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i][j] = Append(channelState[i][j], m)]
                           /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recorded, channel>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i, j \in 1..N: SendMarker(i, j)
      \/ \E i, j \in 1..N, m \in Nat: SendMessage(i, j, m)
      \/ \E i, j \in 1..N: ReceiveMarker(i, j)

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, defaultValue

VARIABLE store

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state: all keys map to a default value *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> defaultValue]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \E k \in Keys, v \in Values :
    /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M, V

AcceptorsState == [ballot: Nat, value: V \cup {None}]
ProposersState == [ballot: Nat, value: V \cup {None}]

Init == 
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> AcceptorsState]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M -> ProposersState]
    /\ chosenValue \in V \cup {None}
    /\ \A a \in 1..N: acceptors[a] = [ballot |-> 0, value |-> None]
    /\ \A p \in 1..M: proposers[p] = [ballot |-> 0, value |-> None]
    /\ chosenValue = None

Prepare(p, b) == 
    /\ proposers[p] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> None]
    /\ \A a \in 1..N: acceptors[a] = [ballot |-> acceptors[a].ballot, value |-> acceptors[a].value]

Accept(p, b, v) == 
    /\ proposers[p] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]
    /\ \A a \in 1..N: acceptors[a] = [ballot |-> acceptors[a].ballot, value |-> acceptors[a].value]

Commit(p, b, v) == 
    /\ proposers[p] = [ballot |-> b, value |-> v]
    /\ chosenValue = v

Next == 
    \/ \E p \in 1..M, b \in Nat: Prepare(p, b)
    \/ \E p \in 1..M, b \in Nat, v \in V: Accept(p, b, v)
    \/ \E p \in 1..M, b \in Nat, v \in V: Commit(p, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosenValue>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> AcceptorsState]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M -> ProposersState]
    /\ chosenValue \in V \cup {None}

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, epsilon, maxDrift

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ clocks \in Seq(N)
          /\ offsets \in Seq(N)
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] \in Nat
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] \in Nat
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] <= maxDrift

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* One round of clock exchange and synchronisation *)
Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] = 0
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] = (Sum(clocks) / N) - clocks[i]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] \in 0..maxDrift

(* Invariant: after one round, all clocks are within epsilon of each other *)
Invariant == /\ \A i, j \in 1..N : Abs(clocks[i] - clocks[j]) <= epsilon

Spec == /\ TypeOK
        /\ Init
        /\ Next

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ flag \in [1..2 -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ turn \in 1..2

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ flag = [1 |-> FALSE, 2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn \in 1..2

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn \in 1..2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 2
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn \in 1..2

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES known, infected

CONSTANT N

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ known[1] = TRUE
        /\ infected[1] = TRUE

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ known[i] = TRUE
          /\ \E j \in 1..N :
                /\ known[j] = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId

Topic == [name: STRING]
Message == [id: Nat, topic: Topic, payload: STRING]
SubscriberId == Nat
PublisherId == Nat

(* Helper functions *)
IsTopic(t) == t \in DOMAIN messages
IsSubscriber(subId) == subId \in DOMAIN subscribers

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ subscribers = [t \in Topic : {}]
        /\ messages = [t \in Topic : <<>>]
        /\ nextMsgId = 1
        /\ nextSubId = 1

(* Actions *)
Register(subId, topic) ==
    /\ IsTopic(topic)
    /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![topic] = subscribers[topic] \cup {subId}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

PostMessage(pubId, topic, payload) ==
    /\ IsTopic(topic)
    /\ LET msg == [id |-> nextMsgId, topic |-> topic, payload |-> payload]
       IN /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(messages[topic], msg)]
          /\ nextMsgId' = nextMsgId + 1
          /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers, nextSubId>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E subId \in SubscriberId, topic \in Topic:
          Register(subId, topic)
      \/ \E pubId \in PublisherId, topic \in Topic, payload \in STRING:
          PostMessage(pubId, topic, payload)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, nextMsgId, nextSubId>>

(* Invariant: messages per topic are in order of IDs *)
TypeOK == /\ \A topic \in Topic:
              messages[topic] = <<>> \/ \A i \in 1..Len(messages[topic]) - 1:
                  messages[topic][i].id < messages[topic][i+1].id

EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES turn, wants

(* --type invariants
   TypeOK ==

*)

(* --liveness properties
   Safety == 
     \A i, j \in {1,2} : 
       /\ i # j
       /\ wants[i] = TRUE
       /\ wants[j] = TRUE
       /\ turn = i
   Liveness == 
     \A i \in {1,2} : 
       wants[i] = TRUE
       => <> (turn = i)
*)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
